hints.BUSH: Family name of two presidents, including the 43rd
hints.OBAMA: 44th president, first African American to hold the office
hints.TRUMP: Real estate mogul who became the 45th and 47th president
hints.BIDEN: Long-serving senator who became the 46th president
hints.JACKSON: Old Hickory; 7th president and frontier general
hints.POLK: 11th president; expanded U.S. westward via the Mexican War
hints.TRUMAN: 33rd president; ordered the atomic bombings of Japan
hints.JOHNSON: Texan who became 36th president after Kennedy's death
hints.WASHINGTON: First U.S. president; on the dollar bill
hints.ADAMS: Second U.S. president; Founding Father from Massachusetts
hints.JEFFERSON: Third U.S. president; primary author of the Declaration
hints.MADISON: Fourth U.S. president; Father of the Constitution
